lines.raw: Our new neighbour | 我们的新邻居

lines.english: Listen to the tape then answer this question.
lines.chinese: 听录音，然后回答这个问题。
lines.raw: Listen to the tape then answer this question. | 听录音，然后回答这个问题。

lines.english: Why is Nigel a lucky man?
lines.chinese: 为什么奈杰尔是个幸运的人？
lines.raw: Why is Nigel a lucky man? | 为什么奈杰尔是个幸运的人？

lines.english: Nigel is our new next-door neighbour.
lines.chinese: 奈杰尔是我们的新邻居。
lines.raw: Nigel is our new next-door neighbour. | 奈杰尔是我们的新邻居。
He's a pilot. | 他是一名飞行员。
He was in the R.A.F. | 他曾服役于皇家空军。

lines.english: He will fly to New York next month.
lines.raw: He will fly to New York next month. | 下个月他将飞往纽约。

lines.english: The month after next he'll fly to Tokyo.
lines.chinese: 下下个月他将飞往东京。
lines.raw: The month after next he'll fly to Tokyo. | 下下个月他将飞往东京。

lines.english: At the moment, he's in Madrid.
lines.raw: At the moment, he's in Madrid. | 此刻，他在马德里。

lines.english: He flew to Spain a week ago.
lines.raw: He flew to Spain a week ago. | 一周前他飞往西班牙。

lines.english: He'll return to London the week after next.
lines.raw: He'll return to London the week after next. | 下下周他将返回伦敦。
He's only forty-one years old, | 他只有四十一岁，

lines.english: and he has already been to nearly every country in the world.
lines.chinese: 而且他已经去过世界上几乎每一个国家。
lines.raw: and he has already been to nearly every country in the world. | 而且他已经去过世界上几乎每一个国家。

lines.english: Nigel is a very lucky man.
lines.chinese: 奈杰尔是一个非常幸运的人。
lines.raw: Nigel is a very lucky man. | 奈杰尔是一个非常幸运的人。

lines.english: But his wife isn't very lucky.
lines.chinese: 但是他的妻子却不那么幸运。
lines.raw: But his wife isn't very lucky. | 但是他的妻子却不那么幸运。
She usually stays at home! | 她通常待在家里！
